title: Columbia Rain Jacket — Waterproof & Breathable
short_description: Lightweight rain jacket with Omni-Tech membrane. 100% waterproof, breathable, and packable into its own pocket.
long_description: The Columbia Rain Jacket featuring Omni-Tech technology keeps you dry while ensuring full breathability. The adjustable hood and sealed seams provide comprehensive protection against rain. Conveniently, the jacket can be packed into its own pocket, taking up minimal space — perfect for any hike.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who prioritize practical features in clothing: Omni-Tech membrane, 100% waterproof, breathable.
